hero.subtext: Exclusive off-market opportunities. High returns. Full-service investment advisory.

cantFind.modalTitle: Can't find what you're looking for?
cantFind.modalSubtitle: Tell us your requirements and we'll match you with suitable properties within 24 hours.
cantFind.notesPlaceholder: Any specific requirements — floor level, view, furnishing, etc.
cantFind.successBody: Our advisors have received your requirements and will match you with the most suitable properties within 24 hours.

whatWeDo.body: EVOORION is a Dubai-based luxury real estate investment firm dedicated to helping high-net-worth individuals build and grow their real estate portfolios with confidence and precision.
whatWeDo.service1Desc: Access pre-launch opportunities from Dubai's most prestigious developers. Secure units at pre-market pricing with flexible payment plans and exceptional capital appreciation potential.
whatWeDo.service2Desc: Immediate rental income from handpicked ready-to-occupy villas, apartments, and penthouses in Dubai's most sought-after communities — delivering 8–12% annual rental yields.
whatWeDo.service3Desc: End-to-end investment management: market intelligence, legal structuring, property management, and portfolio optimisation — all handled by our expert team.

whyDubai.stat1Desc: No property or capital gains tax.
whyDubai.stat2Desc: Among the highest rental yields globally.
whyDubai.stat3Desc: Full ownership in designated freehold areas.
whyDubai.stat4Desc: Dubai ranked #1 city to live and invest.

process.step1Desc: We conduct a thorough discovery session to understand your investment goals, risk profile, and preferences.
process.step2Desc: Our advisors curate a bespoke shortlist of off-market and listed properties matched to your criteria.
process.step3Desc: We handle negotiations, legal due diligence, SPA drafting, and DLD registration — end to end.
process.step4Desc: Post-acquisition, our team ensures your asset is tenanted, managed, and optimised for maximum yield.

footer.tagline: Your gateway to exclusive Dubai real estate. We connect discerning investors with the finest luxury properties, delivering exceptional returns and a seamless acquisition experience.
footer.newsletter: Stay informed on exclusive Dubai real estate opportunities.
footer.serving: Serving: Palm Jumeirah · Downtown · Marina · Business Bay · JVC · Creek Harbour
